workflow_provenance: M7 duplicate arose from a Windows Update restart and a new browser session resuming the same task; this does not alter scientific evidence.
ordered_carrier_filter: exactly two admissible channels in both pairings and wall-safe q-factorials at the anchor

descriptor.construction: permutation-invariant Reynolds statistics computed over all valid ordered realizations of each external-spin multiset
base_quantities: normalized external Casimir multiset moments of orders 1 through 4
normalized channel-Casimir endpoint and gap statistics in both pairings
orbit mean and orbit second moment of the four entries of F(theta0)
orbit mean determinant and trace invariants of F(theta0)

stopping_rule: No post-evaluation feature addition, alpha tuning, family replacement, target transformation change or threshold change is permitted.

claim_firewall.allowed_if_passed: The frozen permutation-invariant descriptor predicts the declared family-mean local recoupling jet on the independent high-spin atlas within the registered thresholds.

evidence_rule: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
